summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - All 20 backend tests passed. Task Marketplace (10 categories), Building System (5 categories), World Map (8 regions, 15 terrain types), Character Customization with 3D Model Descriptors all working. Fixed Character model to include 'model' field for Unity export.
passed_tests: GET /api/task-marketplace/categories - Returns 10 categories (data_labeling, transcription, content_moderation, ai_training, quality_assurance, creative_writing, creative_art, translation, research, world_building)
GET /api/task-marketplace/categories - Each category has name, description, icon, color, base_pay_range, skills_rewarded
GET /api/task-marketplace/categories - Returns 6 difficulty levels (trivial, easy, medium, hard, expert, legendary)
GET /api/task-marketplace/tasks - Returns task list with pagination
GET /api/task-marketplace/stats - Returns marketplace statistics
GET /api/building/catalog - Returns 5 categories (basic_structures, functional_buildings, decorative, paths, special)
GET /api/building/catalog - Returns grid_size=100 and cell_size=32
GET /api/building/catalog - Basic structures has 7 buildings (wooden_house, stone_house, cottage, tower, wall_segment, gate, bridge)
GET /api/building/catalog - Functional buildings have function field
GET /api/building/catalog - All buildings have name, size, cost, materials
GET /api/world-map/config - Returns 8 regions (village_square, oracle_sanctum, the_forge, ancient_library, wanderers_rest, shadow_grove, watchtower, outer_realms)
GET /api/world-map/config - Returns 15 terrain types
GET /api/world-map/config - Regions have name, position, size, terrain, color, connectedTo
GET /api/world-map/config - Terrain types have color, traversable, speed_mod
GET /api/world-map/config - Returns default_size (100x100)
POST /api/characters - Creates character with 3D model descriptor
PUT /api/character/{id} - Updates character with new model
GET /api/character/{id} - Returns character with model field
GET /api/character/{id} - Returns user_id for ownership verification
GET /api/character/{invalid_id} - Returns 404
frontend_tests_passed: Landing Page loads with Enter The Echoes button
Landing Page has Continue Journey button
Landing Page has Global Dataspace button
Continue Journey redirects to /auth when not logged in (session isolation working)
Character Customization has 4 tabs (Basic, Appearance, Body, Style)
Basic tab has Character Name input, Age slider, Background Story textarea, Quick Backgrounds
Basic tab has Personality Traits selection (0/4)
Appearance tab has Face Type, Skin Tone, Hair Style, Hair Color, Eye Color, Features
Body tab has Body Type selection (Athletic, Muscular, Slender, Stocky, Average) and Height slider
Style tab has Clothing Style selection (8 options) and Additional Details textarea
3D Model Descriptor (Engine Export) section shows JSON with all model properties
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Character model to include 'model' field with default values for 3D engine export
Fixed CharacterCreate model to accept optional 'model' field
Fixed create_character endpoint to merge provided model with defaults
Task Marketplace has 10 categories covering human/robot integration tasks
Building System has 5 categories with grid-based placement (100x100 grid, 32px cells)
World Map has 8 interconnected regions with 15 terrain types
Continue Journey auth check verifies character belongs to logged-in user
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added 'model' field to Character model, updated CharacterCreate and create_character endpoint
/app/backend/tests/test_p1_features_iter14.py - New test file for P1 features
seed_data_creation: Test characters created with TEST_ prefix for model testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested: 1) Task Marketplace at /api/task-marketplace/* with 10 categories for human/robot integration. 2) Building System at /api/building/* with 5 categories and grid-based placement. 3) World Map at /api/world-map/* with 8 regions and 15 terrain types. 4) Character Customization with 3D Model Descriptors for Unity export. Continue Journey auth check verifies character ownership.
